sqlMap.insert: insert into board ( board_id, mem_id, board_index, board_title, board_date, board_content, prod_id, board_secrete ) values ( 'b' || board_seq.nextval, #mem_id#, #board_index#, #board_title#, sysdate, #board_content#, #prod_id#, #board_secrete# )
sqlMap.update: update board set board_title = #board_title# , prod_id = #prod_id# , board_date = sysdate , board_content = #board_content# , board_secrete = #board_secrete# where board_id = #board_id#
sqlMap.select: select board_id , mem_id , board_index , board_title , prod_id , to_char(board_date, 'yyyy-mm-dd') board_date , board_content , board_secrete from board where board_id like 'b%'
select * from board where board_content like '%'||#board_content#||'%' or board_title like '%'||#board_title#||'%' and board_secrete = '0' and board_id like 'b%'
SELECT a.board_id, a.board_title, a.mem_id, a.board_content, b.prod_name, a.board_secrete FROM board a, prod b where a.prod_id = b.prod_id and a.board_id like 'r%' and a.prod_id = #prod_id#
SELECT count(*) FROM board where board_id like 'r%' and prod_id = #prod_id#

select A.* from( select rownum as rnum, B.* from ( SELECT a.board_id, a.board_title, a.mem_id, a.board_content, b.prod_name, a.board_secrete, a.prod_id FROM board a, prod b where a.prod_id = b.prod_id and a.board_id like 'r%' and a.prod_id = #prod_id# order by board_id desc)B where rownum <= #end#)A where A.rnum >= #start#
sqlMap.insert: insert into board ( board_id, mem_id, board_secrete, board_index, board_date, board_content, prod_id ) values ( 'r' || board_seq.nextval, #mem_id#, #board_secrete#, #board_index#, sysdate, #board_content#, #prod_id# )
sqlMap.update: update board set board_title = #board_title# , board_date = sysdate , board_content = #board_content# where board_id = #board_id#
sqlMap.select: select count(*) from mem_order a, detail_order b, delivery c where c.del_status = '배송완료' and a.mem_id = #mem_id# and a.order_id = b.order_id and b.prod_id =#prod_id#
select board_id , board_index , board_title , board_content , mem_id from notice
sqlMap.insert: insert into notice ( board_id, board_index, board_title, board_content, mem_id ) values ( 'n' || board_seq.nextval, #board_index#, #board_title#, #board_content#, #mem_id# )
sqlMap.update: update notice set board_title = #board_title# , board_index = #board_index# , board_content = #board_content# where board_id = #board_id#
